description: Lightweight official source index only. This file does not contain official data, scraped responses, media, scores, rankings, squads, or prediction snapshots.

sources.label: FIFA 2026 match calendar
sources.purpose: Primary official structured source for fixtures, match status, scores, venues, and match-centre URLs after quality gates pass.

sources.label: FIFA men's world ranking
sources.purpose: Audit and explanation context unless a separate reviewed strength snapshot promotes derived values.

sources.label: FIFA 2026 official squads
sources.purpose: Audit and explanation context for squads after manual review.

sources.label: FIFA match centre
sources.purpose: Audit context for fixture pages, match-centre links, and reviewable match facts.

sources.label: United States National Weather Service API
sources.purpose: Audit context for United States venue weather after review.

sources.label: Canadian weather API
sources.purpose: Audit context for Canada venue weather after review.

sources.label: Mexico National Meteorological Service API
sources.purpose: Audit context for Mexico venue weather after review.
